case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MASON, PHILLIP.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MASON, PHILLIP.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,220.86 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MASON, PHILLIP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASON, PHILLIP. $3,220.86 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,246.86 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
